name: Fieldstone
title: Fieldstone | Weekly Arcade
description: Play Fieldstone free online. A Tetris-like kingdom builder! Place terrain tiles, harvest resources, build your army, and defend against waves of enemies.
keywords: puzzle game, strategy game, tetris-like, kingdom builder, free game, browser game
tips: Complete full rows early to build up resources before enemies arrive
Place defensive terrain near the edges where enemies approach
Don't leave gaps in rows — incomplete rows waste valuable board space
Balance resource harvesting with army building as waves get harder
Preview the next piece and plan placement two moves ahead
howToPlay: Place terrain tiles on the board like Tetris. Complete full rows to harvest resources. Use resources to build armies and defenses. Enemies attack in waves — survive by balancing puzzle-solving with kingdom defense.
